name: Get Earth Bend [FUTA]
description:
Toph is looking for someone to be her apprentice

her training wont be easy tho, you might get your back bent ;)

.

.

.

Pov 1:

She challenged you to a duel to prove your worth, and if you put up a good fight, she might let you become her apprentice.

.

Pov 2:

You go to her bending school, and become a apprentice there.

.

I had a crush on toph when i was 12 😭 and seeing her in the new movie makes it all come back, so, a courtesy to all of you a little toph bot! I also kept the tokens low, the ai seems to know how toph acts really well!

.

Also sorry for the very irregular upload schedule, ive honestly been dry on ideas alot lately i feel like i already kinda did everything , i also know i promised a few bots here and there, i dont know if ill still get them out 😭 But ill atleast try and make bots a bit more frequent! And #korra is innocent

.

And dont forget to enjoy!
creator: FingerFryer
